EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Web gateway {event_src.host} denied host {src.host} access to resource {object.path}. HTTP status code {datafield1}: {datafield2}
Web-gateway {event_src.host} detected malware in reply to request from host {src.host} to resource {object.path}. HTTP status code {datafield1}: {datafield2}
Web gateway {event_src.host} allowed host {src.host} access to resource {object.path}. HTTP status code {datafield1}: {datafield2}
